case_title: SPINKS, SAMUEL VS STRERBICH, ANTHONY et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-19-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-07-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 FOR PLAINTIFF TO SERVE DEFENDANT STRERBICH AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,502.98 FILED BY SPINKS, SAMUEL AS TO DEFENDANT STRERBICH, ANTHONY SUNSET SCAVENGER COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-19-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-07-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-15-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPINKS, SAMUEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STRERBICH, ANTHONY SUNSET SCAVENGER COMPANY $2,502.98 PRINCIPAL, $27.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,529.98, DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ANTHONY STRERBICH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPINKS, SAMUEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STRERBICH, ANTHONY SUNSET SCAVENGER COMPANY $1,251.49 PRINCIPAL, $27.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,278.49, NOR CAL WASTE SYSTEMS, INC IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. SUNSET SCAVENGER COMPANY REPLACES NOR CAL SYSTEMS, INC AS DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERTIFIED MAILING TO NOR CAL SYSTEM, INC. RETURNED SIGNED.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JAN-18-2002, GRANTED
